name: pattern-lang
description: Language support for Pattern language with LSP integration

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run copy-lsp
scripts.package:lsp: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const dest=path.join(__dirname,'server'); if(!fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true}); const patterns=['lsp-csharp','lsp-csharp.exe']; const searchDirs=[path.join(__dirname,'..'),path.join(__dirname,'..','bin'),path.join(__dirname,'..','build')]; for(const dir of searchDirs){if(fs.existsSync(dir)){const files=fs.readdirSync(dir,{recursive:true,withFileTypes:true}).filter(f=>f.isFile()&&patterns.some(p=>f.name===p)); for(const file of files){const src=path.join(file.path||dir,file.name); const dst=path.join(dest,file.name); fs.copyFileSync(src,dst); fs.chmodSync(dst,0o755); console.log('Copied',src,'to',dst);}}}"
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run copy-lsp
